ps-spa is a PureScript SPA framework inspired by elm-spa.

Use it like this:

- Pages live in src/Pages
- Generated code lives in src/Generated
- Run ps-spa gen after route or page structure changes
- Prefer editing src/Pages over editing src/Generated
- Verify generated state with ps-spa verify

Important paths in this repository:

- src/PsSpa: framework core
- scripts/cli: generator and scaffolding logic
- examples/basic: standalone example app
- examples/tailwind: standalone example app with Tailwind scaffolding

See:

- docs/getting-started.md
- docs/architecture.md
- docs/ai-usage.md
- docs/publishing.md
